name: Whonix
description: Anonymous OS via Tor (VM-based) Tool: https://whonix.org/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #797 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Whonix output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
